title: lactaria calocarpa
intro: Lactaria calocarpa, also known as the Red-stemmed Milk-cap, is a species of edible mushroom that belongs to the family Lactariaceae. The medicinal properties of Lactaria calocarpa include its potential anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. The health benefits associated with consuming Lactaria calocarpa include improved immune function, reduced inflammation, and enhanced antioxidant defenses. The herbal preparations of Lactaria calocarpa typically involve drying and powdering the mushroom, which can then be used in teas, capsules, or other supplements to harness its medicinal properties.
